name: persona-beginner-studio
description: USDD persona goalpost G1 (S-PERSONA-COPY) - BEGINNER: the Solo modal speaks the beginner vocabulary budget (outcome-named buttons: Keep + practice / Just practice / Keep building) and the Studio opens with ONE beginner orientation tip (studiofirst notable); theory prose (whynote) still absent. Persona journey state: the first-open welcome (firstrun) is already dismissed - the graded one-tip-at-a-time slot is free for studiofirst. G2 (S-POSTPROG-CUE): once the chords + key make Solo live, the beginner sees ONE next-move cue (postprog notable); tapping Solo dismisses it for good, freeing the one-tip journey slot so the Studio tip can still claim.

steps.label: guidance ask suppressed for a set persona
beginner Studio orientation tip PRESENT (studiofirst notable)
whynote theory banner ABSENT for beginner
